name: Danny Mixon
abstract: Daniel Asbury Mixon (August 19, 1949 – May 1, 2026) was an American mainstream jazz hard Bop and post Bop pianist.

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Betty Carter and the Danny Mixon Trio

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: In the rhythm is the rhythm section you saw last night: Danny Mixon, Dave Gibson, and Gerald Cannon... That’s it. We have a couple of vocalists that we like to work with... That’s the Loud Minority family.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Blue
about_quotes.evidence: Now that Zeke isn’t with us anymore, Danny Mixon plays piano with us now, yeah.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Blue interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 23, 2022
